chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1063 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 4830/2022 2. For hearing of main case 06.08.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo advocate for the petitioner Mr. Dur Muhammad DAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that this petition has become infructuous, as such, he does not press the same, it is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with all pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
